board.race_name: WATCH PGR ON SKY SPORTS RACING STAKES
THE FUTURE OF RACING PGR TV STAKES
SPORTSBET SUPPORTERS OF HAVING A CRACK

G:BAL:6:2026-07-08.comment: 1. ASTON LACE stalked the lead then burst clear to score (26.06) at Geelong in a Grade 5 over 460m. The one to beat again. 7. PAW ZENITH had been in super honest form hitting the frame three times on end before finishing sixth (24.98) at Sale last time. Form at the trip sound including five wins. Has ability and can atone. 8. ELECTRIC MAYHEM was safely held in tougher company last start after settling off pace at Sandown, but prior to that won by 3 lengths at Bendigo (28.35) beating Aussie Raven in a Grade 5 on June 10. Goes well out of this box with a win and four minor placings. A forward showing wouldn’t surprise. 2. ALACRITY DAVE cannot be ruled out.

runners.name: ASTON LACE
runners.comment: Good effort to score just five days ago over 460m at Geelong by 1.75 lengths in a Grade 5. Looks well placed and can measure up again.

runners.name: HONEY STIRRER
runners.comment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when third (28.97) over 510m at Sale. Tricky draw to overcome. Solid top-three prospects.

runners.name: ZIPPING TYRA
runners.comment: Strong performance to win by 2 lengths at Bendigo over 500m (28.64) beating Ollie Reiko in Bottom Up - Grade 5 on July 1. Prepared to risk on this occasion.

runners.name: PAW ZENITH
runners.comment: Last start finished 6th on July 5 over 435m at Sale behind Paw Estrella beaten 8 lengths (24.98) in a Grade 4/5. Had been in strong form, hitting the frame three times on end, before the latest effort. Can atone.

runners.name: ELECTRIC MAYHEM
runners.comment: Didn't make the placings last time at Sandown (30.85) in a Grade 5 NP, finishing a 13 length eighth. Has never missed the frame from five starts from the draw, including a win. Expected to go close.

runners.name: ALACRITY DAVE
runners.comment: Was out of the placings last time but the start prior finished in the minors when third (28.88) over 500m at Bendigo. Has a low draw and is in the mix.

runners.name: DAZZLING DYNAMO
runners.comment: Good effort last time when second (24.37) over 425m at Bendigo. Drawn close to the inside. Has to do a bit more.

runners.name: PETE'S ENTITY
runners.comment: Has finished seventh at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 9 lengths behind Paw Elodee over 450m. Capable of taking this out.

G:NAM:2:2026-07-08.comment: 3. RYDER RIPPLE turned in a fair 4th placed finish last time at this track over 305m (18.90). Goes well out of this box with a win and five minor placings. Better than the latest effort and deserves another chance. 5. MARCO MCROW found the frame for the second consecutive time when narrowly beaten into third last time out (18.77) over 305m at this track. Expected to do much better this time. 2. INVINCIA JEWEL ran good time (18.42) when third last start over 305m at this track, the second placing in a row. Well placed here and can atone this time. 4. HOLLYS GOLD returns from a 11 weeks layoff and deserves plenty of thought.

runners.name: INVINCIA JEWEL
runners.comment: Has been in the minor money the last two runs, the latest finishing third (18.42) at this track. Worth including.

runners.name: MARCO MCROW
runners.comment: Latest effort finished 3rd on July 1 over 305m at this track behind Flame Wood beaten 5 lengths (18.77) in a D4. Rates highly on best form. Expected to feature.

runners.name: SUDOKY ZOOM
runners.comment: Last start finished fifth over 305m at this track, beaten 7 lengths (19.10) behind Sonic Pixie in a D4 on July 1. Not keen, needs to lift.

runners.name: HOLLYS GOLD
runners.comment: Returns from a 11 weeks spell after being tipped out on the back of a sixth (31.43) over 500m at this track. Capable of playing a big role.

runners.name: RYDER RIPPLE
runners.comment: Latest effort finished 4th in a D4 on July 1 over 305m at this track behind Sonic Pixie beaten 4.5 lengths (18.90). Forward showing expected.

H:BAT:9:2026-07-08.comment: 1. TIGER JEWEL got it wrong when resuming but was very good last week when she raced three wide at this circuit and distance before boxing on for a 4.6m third. Fitter again and should get every chance from the ace draw in a race weakened by scratchings. 4. SMALL INCOME came from the back row when beaten less than 4m here last start. Good effort for second three back at Penrith. Can measure up off that effort. 7. FOGWATCH draws wider but is worth including following a respectable third at his most recent appearance. 9. BOOMER SHANNON is a long-time maiden but was only beaten 3.3m last start and draws for a trail so include.

runners.name: TIGER JEWEL
runners.comment: Two back was well beaten into tenth behind Maybe Janis at Parkes over 1660m in a 3yo F on June 21 at $1.40. Then a handy effort when beaten by 4.5 m finishing third behind Cheval Tiger at this track over 1730m in a M on July 1 at $3. Fitter again and should get every chance from the ace draw.

runners.name: SMALL INCOME
runners.comment: Last start 6th (Sr1) over 1730m at this track was 7th-12.74 at the bell, beaten 4 m by Onedarknight (2:10.40) on July 1 at $18. Before that, was driven from back in the field when 10th (Fr6) over 1730m at this track, at the bell was 7th-15.66 beaten 17 m by Mondo Glitz (2:05.90) on June 17 at $51. This looks a suitable assignment.

runners.name: WINDFIELD BLUE
runners.comment: Second up after running was driven from back in the field when 9th (Fr6) over 1720m at Dubbo, at the bell was 9th-19.2 beaten 19 m by Stay Lucky (2:08.30) in 3yo on June 12 at $41. Possible improver.

runners.name: FOGWATCH
runners.comment: Improved last start with a solid effort despite getting well back, when 3rd (Fr5) over 1730m at this track was 9th-17.78 at the bell, beaten 2.5 m by Onedarknight (2:10.40) on July 1 at $51. Good showing expected.

runners.name: BOOMER SHANNON
runners.comment: Last start 5th (Sr2) over 1730m at this track, at the bell was 2nd-2.26 beaten 3.5 m by Onedarknight (2:10.40) on July 1 at $26. Before that, 9th (Fr4) over 1730m after showing early speed and racing wide at this track, at the bell was 3rd-3.42 beaten 10 m by Sing With One Voice (2:06.30) on June 10 at $41. First four hope.

runners.name: LITTLE ADELAIDE
runners.comment: Last start 9th (Fr4) over 1730m at this track was 3rd-4.51 at the bell, beaten 10 m by Onedarknight (2:10.40) on July 1 at $17. Two runs back 6th (Fr5) over 2260m at this track, beaten 19 m by Stuckinafence (2:52.80) on May 29 at $17. Cannot enthuse.

runners.name: BABY EL AY
runners.comment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 8th (Fr6) over 1730m at this track was 6th-10.22 at the bell, beaten 8 m by Onedarknight (2:10.40) on July 1 at $51. Two runs back 4th (Sr1) over 1730m at this track, at the bell was 3rd-5.05 beaten 12 m by Glinda Shannon (2:10.10) on June 24 at $12. Improvement needed.

runners.name: EMILYS PRINCE
runners.comment: Last start was well back in the run when 10th (Fr8) over 1730m at this track, at the bell was 10th-20.2 beaten 16 m by Tennessee Kid (2:06.80) on June 24 at $126. Two runs back 9th (Fr8) over 1730m at this track, at the bell was 9th-19.92 beaten 17 m by Mondo Glitz (2:05.90) on June 17 at $31. Must do a more.

runners.name: DREAM TO CURE
runners.comment: Last start 4th (Fr1) over 1730m at this track was 5th-8.76 at the bell, beaten 3 m by Onedarknight (2:10.40) on July 1 at $12. Before that, was driven from back in the field when 5th (Fr8) over 1730m at this track, at the bell was 9th-22.21 beaten 13 m by Glinda Shannon (2:10.10) on June 24 at $17. Strips fitter and from an inside draw can make an impact.

runners.name: A TRUE PHENOMENON
runners.comment: Solid run when beaten by 2.25 m finishing second behind Glinda Shannon at this track over 1730m on June 24 at $17. Then a handy effort when beaten by 2.25 m finishing second after a quick start, behind Onedarknight at this track over 1730m on July 1 at $9.50. In fine form. Looks close to a win and draws well.

G:KIK:7:2026-07-08.comment: 4. KILTEGAN SHIV jumped from this trap last time and also the same course and distance when a one length third (30.30) in an A7. Has the ability and looks a key chance. 5. HILLROAD BELLE shows ability but remains a maiden after 15 starts. Is performing well without winning placing at her last three starts. Winning chance. 1. DIDDLEY DODA was midfield throughout and finished there last time when 5th (30.34) at this track. Key player if finds best. 6. LARKINS SPICE was unplaced here last start but gets her chance to atone.

runners.name: LARKINS SPICE
runners.comment: Most recent effort finished 5th in an A7 on July 1 over 480m at this track behind Home Cedrie beaten 5 lengths (30.53). Looks a solid contender.

runners.name: HILLROAD BELLE
runners.comment: Last start finished 3rd over 480m at this track beaten 5.5 lengths (30.82) behind Larkins Sophie in an A7 on July 1. Capable of improvement on latest effort. Well placed and should feature.

runners.name: KILTEGAN SHIV
runners.comment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 480m. Last start finished 3rd on July 1 over 480m at this track behind Chiltern Emmie beaten one length (30.30) in an A7. Rates highly and looks tough to beat.

runners.name: YACHT MARSHAL
runners.comment: Has finished fourth at his last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 480m. Not up to this.

runners.name: DIDDLEY DODA
runners.comment: Drawn the inside alley. At the last outing finished 5th over 480m at this track beaten 1.75 lengths (30.34) behind Chiltern Emmie in an A7 on July 1. Major threat on best form.

runners.name: KITS FLICK
runners.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage sixth last time out over 480m at this track. Tempted to look elsewhere.

G:RIC:6:2026-07-08.comment: 1. STEPHEN WITHERAP has a strong record this trip with 19 wins and 13 placings from 43 starts. Placed last time (18.04) at this track in a Free For All, finishing second and beaten one length. Looks a leading chance on best. 8. ZIPPING ZEPPELIN was game in defeat when finished in the minors last start over the 320m at this track, running a good 18.08 in a Free For All. Has the ability and looks a key chance. 2. MAYBE NEXT WEEK was out of placings last time (18.18) at this track in a Free For All, finishing fourth and beaten 3 lengths. With even luck and a clean start should be around the money. 4. SUMMER DREAM must be respected as a past winner at this course and distance.

runners.name: STEPHEN WITHERAP
runners.comment: Won two starts back over 320m at this track. Last start he finished 2nd on July 3 over 320m at this track behind Summer Dream beaten one length (18.04) in a Free For All. Draw likely to suit. Has run very fast time at this course and distance. Go close on his best form.

runners.name: MAYBE NEXT WEEK
runners.comment: Was a winner three back at this track then finished in the minors before missing the frame last time when fourth (18.18) at this track. Has ability and looks one of the hopes in this.

runners.name: ZIPPING ZEPPELIN
runners.comment: Placed last time (18.08) at this track in a Free For All, finishing third and beaten 1.75 lengths. Has a win and three places from four starts from this draw. Makes strong appeal.

runners.name: SUMMER DREAM
runners.comment: Good effort to win last start by one length over 320m at this track in a handy (17.96), beating Stephen Witherap. Can bring up a hat-trick.

runners.name: ISABELLA KADE
runners.comment: Was out of placings last time (22.95) at Gosford in a Grade 5, finishing seventh and beaten 9 lengths. Goes very well off the draw boasting three wins and two places from seven starts. Others appear better placed.

runners.name: RAINY DREAM
runners.comment: Has hit the frame the last couple. Finished third at this track latest but prior to that clocked a solid 18.24 over 320m finishing second at this track. Place prospects appear best again.

runners.name: SHANTI BAY
runners.comment: Good effort to win last start by 0.8 lengths over 365m at Nowra in a handy (20.71), beating Firefly Gal. Will find this a bit tougher, tempted to look elsewhere.

G:MEA:7:2026-07-08.comment: 8. SEGER hit the ground running with a slick early sectional but ran over late and missed the frame when a 2.25 lengths fourth (38.41) over 660m at Bendigo. Has claims if he runs up to expectations. 2. SOCIALISM missed the frame and was safely held latest finishing 6th at Ballarat following on from a third place finish (30.75) at this track the start prior. Should be about the money. 4. GLOWING ETHICS has been mixing form lately, hitting the frame two back before finishing sixth (35.26) at Sandown in a Grade 5. Expecting significant improvement this line-up. 5. TO PERU won by a wide margin last start. Hard to beat again.

runners.name: TO PERU
runners.comment: Good performance after tracking the speed to win by 1.75 lengths at Warragul over 460m (26.43) beating She's Salty in Rank Limit - Grade 5 on July 2. Ran one of the fastest times on the program in her latest win. Stay with her.

runners.name: SOCIALISM
runners.comment: Won over this track and trip. Last start finished 6th in a Restricted WIN on July 1 over 545m at Ballarat behind Starborn beaten 20 lengths (32.51). Capable of improvement on latest effort. Well placed and should feature.

runners.name: MISS JECKELL
runners.comment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (35.42) in a Grade 5, finishing a 3 length fifth. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and six places from 15 starts. Looking to others.

runners.name: GLOWING ETHICS
runners.comment: Missed the frame last time but finished in the minors at big odds two back when second (34.98) over 600m at this track. Tough draw to overcome but is among the better hopes.

runners.name: GREYSYND BONNIE
runners.comment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when second (30.53) over 525m at this track. Tough draw to overcome and will need the right run to feature.

runners.name: SEGER
runners.comment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 4th over 660m at Bendigo beaten 2.25 lengths (38.41) behind Balding Sandy in a Restricted WIN H on June 5. Placed two back at Warrnambool. Capable of improvement on latest effort. Well placed and should feature.

G:CNP:2:2026-07-08.comment: 7. IMPRESS CARMEN looks close to another win after hitting the frame in a 6 length third (22.48) in a Novice race at this track. Racing well and deserves a win. 8. ORANA JET copped a check in the run and finished a well held 8 lengths fourth (22.66) last time in a Novice race at this track over 381m. Key player if finds best. 5. STUBBORN MOUSE has been in the money at her last two runs, most recently when second (22.21) in a Novice race over 381m at this track. Well placed here and can atone this time. 2. ELECTRIC KUNA is new to this distance but cannot be left out.

runners.name: ORANA JET
runners.comment: Was a winner three back at this track then finished in the minors before missing the frame last time when fourth (22.66) at this track. Well placed here and expected to bounce back.

runners.name: STUBBORN MOUSE
runners.comment: Working her way into winning form after claiming her maiden success on May 27 at this track over 381m. Last start was second over 381m in 22.21, behind Send It Alfie. Forward showing expected.

runners.name: ELECTRIC KUNA
runners.comment: Ended last campaign with a fifth (35.33) in a NOV at this track and returns after a ten weeks break. Capable of playing a big role.

runners.name: ATHENIAN BLADE
runners.comment: Last start finished sixth on June 30 over 400m at Mandurah behind Chi Chi Doll, beaten 6 lengths (23.11) in a Novice race. Shouldn't trouble the top few hopes.

runners.name: IMPRESS CARMEN
runners.comment: Well supported last time and gave a sight after a scorching early split but could only manage third, finishing 6 lengths back (22.48) over 381m at this track. Expected to go very well.

runners.name: MILWAUKEE MATES
runners.comment: Finished second last start (17.44) at big odds over 300m at Mandurah. Gets the rails draw this time. Cannot be ruled out.

runners.name: MATTE BLACK
runners.comment: Needs to do more than recent efforts, the latest a sixth over 488m at Mandurah. This looks too tough.

runners.name: BAND FOR BAND
runners.comment: Has finished last in her last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 381m. Capable of much better. Worth keeping safe.

H:RED:8:2026-07-08.comment: 5. FAN THE FLAME finished seventh last start over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 21 metres, after a good second there the run prior. Beautifully placed and is sure to play a major role. 1. ZOOMER BOOMER is a two-year-old filly from the Graham Dwyer yard on debut. A nice draw on the front line should ensure a cosy run. Showed some ability when a minor placegetter in a recent trial so anticipating a bright start to her career. 4. LIGHTYEAR is ready to improve this prep after debuting with a fourth four months ago over 1660m at Albion Park. 2. WANNABE ME is worth some thought after her last-start fourth over 1780m at this course on July 1. Include from the low draw.

runners.name: SOCIAL OUTING
runners.comment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 6th (Fr6) over 1780m at this track beaten 14 m by Red And Rich (2:13.20) on July 1 at $5. At his previous start solid effort when 2nd (Sr4) over 1850m after racing wide at Marburg, beaten a head by Vera Aguilera (2:17.80) on June 21 at $1.70. Sure to improve on the latest effort.

runners.name: FAN THE FLAME
runners.comment: Last start was seventh after being driven well back, behind Crunchy Tuna at Albion Park over 1660m in a 2yo on June 16 at $7.50. Raced better the start before that with a good run when 2nd (Fr3) over 1660m at Albion Park beaten 2.25 m by Genuine Star (1:59.70) in 2yo on June 9 at $12. Rates highly and from a much better draw can bounce back.

runners.name: ZOOMER BOOMER
runners.comment: Two-year-old filly (Bling It On - Rocky Bay Lass) making her debut. Finished third at Albion Park in a trial on June 30 over 1660m. Placed in a recent trial and expected to run well.

runners.name: WANNABE ME
runners.comment: Last start was well back in the run when 4th (Fr4) over 1780m at this track beaten 10 m by Red And Rich (2:13.20) on July 1 at $10. Before that, 6th (Fr4) over 1660m at Albion Park beaten 10 m by Crunchy Tuna (2:01.30) in 2yo on June 16 at $21. Capable of a better showing.

runners.name: LIGHTYEAR
runners.comment: Two-year-old colt facing the starter for the second time. At debut 4th (Fr5) over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 30 m by San Luca (1:59.50) in 2yo on March 10 at $13. Can play a role in the finish.

runners.name: KISSED
runners.comment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 6th (Fr4) over 1780m at this track beaten 12 m by Awholelottahappy (2:12.50) on June 17 at $41. Two runs back 4th (Fr3) over 1850m at Marburg, beaten 30 m by Pretty Wicked (2:17.40) on June 7 at $31. Has the task ahead.

G:MNM:4:2026-07-08.comment: 4. NODUFF TROPICANA has been on speed at the last couple here and fought on to hit the frame, last outing finishing third beaten 0.7 lengths (29.13). Key chance in this line up. 6. WINTERFIELD BIRD has shown good improvement at her last two starts, most recently finishing 2nd at this track over 480m. Ran one of the fastest times on the program last start despite finishing in the minors. Expected to feature again. 3. SUGAR ROSE broke a string of placings finishing in the money three on end before a last start sixth (39.17) at this track. Solid record here winning four races. Should play a prominent role. 5. LONGACRES FEE must be respected despite an unplaced effort here most recently.

runners.name: LONGACRES FEE
runners.comment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when third (29.84) over 480m at this track. Tricky draw to overcome and looks a each way chance only this field.

runners.name: NODUFF TROPICANA
runners.comment: Last start finished 3rd over 480m at this track beaten 0.7 lengths (29.13) behind Daves Blitz in an A7 on July 2. Has been racing well. Well placed here and looks a leading contender.

runners.name: STARMOUNT HERBIE
runners.comment: Turned in a fair debut over 480m at this track where he settled on speed and faded late to finish fifth (29.40). Further improved and drops down to the inside box this time. Failed to threaten last start and looks tested again.

runners.name: MYSTICAL CASH
runners.comment: Turned in a fair debut over 480m at this track where he settled on speed and faded late to finish fourth (29.29). Likely to be much improved. Prepared to just watch this time.

runners.name: SUGAR ROSE
runners.comment: Was out of the placings last time at this track but prior to that had been racing consistently, notching three minors in a row. Tends to go fairly well off the draw but looks a each way chance only this field.

runners.name: WINTERFIELD BIRD
runners.comment: Latest effort finished 2nd in an A7 on July 1 over 480m at this track behind Transfer Aaliyah beaten a neck (29.31). Has an excellent 28.69 best time at this course and distance. Big chance.

R:MBS:11:2026-07-08.comment: 3. TAISEI SURGE is a talented entire who has been in the money at all four starts. Last appeared when he was successful over 1200m at this track on November 12. Has a very good record here with three wins from four starts. Right in this. 5. CHAMPION HORSE landed his maiden success over this course and distance last time, scoring by 1.5 lengths. Shaping up nicely and he is one of the main chances. 9. JASON BAROWS was comfortably accounted for when fourth last time out over 1200m here after a win at this track at the previous outing. Likely improver with strong prospects. 2. KOTCHAN went around over this course and distance last time and led from the outset to score by 1.5 lengths. Sure to be thereabouts.

runners.name: TAISEI SURGE
runners.comment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last campaign winning by 0.5 len this track November 12 over 1200m defeating Kanetoshi Eterno with 57kg at $3.90. At his first start won by nose this track October 1 over 1200m defeating Dread Knight carrying 57kg at $1.90. Should be right in the finish.

runners.name: TEN X
runners.comment: At the latest run 8th of 12 at this track on June 18 over 1000m, 4.5 len behind Steel Fine carrying 56kg at $10.20. The race before that 4th of 12 at this track on June 4 over 1000m, 4 len behind Green Elixir carrying 56kg at $39.40. Fully tested on his recent run.

runners.name: JASON BAROWS
runners.comment: Racing well recently. Last start tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 8 at this track on June 24 over 1200m, 5 len behind Star Of Moulin with 57kg at $5. The run before that ran on from midfield and won by 3 len at this track June 11 over 1200m defeating Kaseno Force carrying 57kg at $2.20. Capable of more ? worth another chance.

runners.name: CHAMPION HORSE
runners.comment: Third-up today. Resuming 5th of 9 at this track on June 11 over 1200m, 6 len behind Jason Barows carrying 57kg at $35.70. Second run from a spell favourite; won by 1.5 len at this track June 23 over 1200m defeating Glorious Aspen carrying 57kg at $2.90. Found his best form now. Will take beating.

runners.name: MERESANKH
runners.comment: Last start ran second last of 8 at this track on June 24 over 1200m, 8 len behind Star Of Moulin with 55kg at $38.40. The race before that 10th of 12 at this track on June 4 over 1800m, 14 len behind Meisho Hari Son with 55kg at $8.50. Fully tested on her recent run.

runners.name: KOTCHAN
runners.comment: Most recently won by 1.5 len at this track June 23 over 1200m defeating Emma Diamond with 55kg at $15.40. Before that struggled in the run home; ran last of 8 at this track on June 9 over 1200m, 6 len behind Kitasan Mondo carrying 57kg at $6. Definite winning chance. Keep safe.

runners.name: BIG BAND BEAT
runners.comment: Returns from a 39-day let-up. Most recently 6th of 8 at Kochi on May 30 over 1300m, 14 len behind Meisho Fujitaka carrying 57kg at $30.50. The start before that 4th of 10 at Kochi on May 16 over 1400m, 4 len behind Meisho Hosen with 55kg at $15.20. Be tough to make an impression in this line-up.

runners.name: MISSION EYES
runners.comment: At the latest run eased back early on 4th of 7 at this track on June 25 over 1000m, 7 len behind Cilantro carrying 57kg at $52.50. Before that 6th of 11 at Nagoya on May 22 over 1500m, 6 len behind T O Lippmann with 57kg at $43.20. Not going well enough. Needs to lift.

runners.name: FRONTIER BRIGHT
runners.comment: At the latest run won by a nose at this track June 25 over 1200m defeating Sarasa Go Sign with 57kg at $13. The race before that couldn't go on with it; 6th of 9 at this track on June 11 over 1200m, 6 len behind Jason Barows carrying 57kg at $6.50. Last-start winner who can measure up again.

runners.comment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when third (28.97) over 510m at Sale. Tricky draw to overcome. Solid top-three prospects.

runners.comment: Strong performance to win by 2 lengths at Bendigo over 500m (28.64) beating Ollie Reiko in Bottom Up - Grade 5 on July 1. Prepared to risk on this occasion.

runners.comment: Last start finished 6th on July 5 over 435m at Sale behind Paw Estrella beaten 8 lengths (24.98) in a Grade 4/5. Had been in strong form, hitting the frame three times on end, before the latest effort. Can atone.

runners.name: ELECTRIC MAYHEM
runners.comment: Didn't make the placings last time at Sandown (30.85) in a Grade 5 NP, finishing a 13 length eighth. Has never missed the frame from five starts from the draw, including a win. Expected to go close.

runners.name: ALACRITY DAVE
runners.comment: Was out of the placings last time but the start prior finished in the minors when third (28.88) over 500m at Bendigo. Has a low draw and is in the mix.

runners.name: DAZZLING DYNAMO

ZIPPING ZEPPELIN was game in defeat when finished in the minors last start over the 320m at this track, running a good 18.08 in a Free For All. Has the ability and looks a key chance. 2. MAYBE NEXT WEEK was out of placings last time (18.18) at this track in a Free For All, finishing fourth and beaten 3 lengths. With even luck and a clean start should be around the money. 4. SUMMER DREAM must be respected as a past winner at this course and distance.

runners.name: STEPHEN WITHERAP
runners.comment: Won two starts back over 320m at this track. Last start he finished 2nd on July 3 over 320m at this track behind Summer Dream beaten one length (18.04) in a Free For All. Draw likely to suit. Has run very fast time at this course and distance. Go close on his best form.

runners.name: MAYBE NEXT WEEK
runners.comment: Was a winner three back at this track then finished in the minors before missing the frame last time when fourth (18.18) at this track. Has ability and looks one of the hopes in this.

runners.name: ZIPPING ZEPPELIN
runners.comment: Placed last time (18.08) at this track in a Free For All, finishing third and beaten 1.75 lengths. Has a win and three places from four starts from this draw. Makes strong appeal.

runners.name: SUMMER DREAM
runners.comment: Good effort to win last start by one length over 320m at this track in a handy (17.96), beating Stephen Witherap. Can bring up a hat-trick.

runners.name: ISABELLA KADE
runners.comment: Was out of placings last time (22.95) at Gosford in a Grade 5, finishing seventh and beaten 9 lengths. Goes very well off the draw boasting three wins and two places from seven starts. Others appear better placed.

runners.name: RAINY DREAM
runners.comment: Has hit the frame the last couple. Finished third at this track latest but prior to that clocked a solid 18.24 over 320m finishing second at this track. Place prospects appear best again.

runners.name: SHANTI BAY
runners.comment: Good effort to win last start by 0.8 lengths over 365m at Nowra in a handy (20.71), beating Firefly Gal. Will find this a bit tougher, tempted to look elsewhere.

G:MEA:7:2026-07-08.comment: 8. SEGER hit the ground running with a slick early sectional but ran over late and missed the frame when a 2.25 lengths fourth (38.41) over 660m at Bendigo. Has claims if he runs up to expectations. 2. SOCIALISM missed the frame and was safely held latest finishing 6th at Ballarat following on from a third place finish (30.75) at this track the start prior. Should be about the money. 4. GLOWING ETHICS has been mixing form lately, hitting the frame two back before finishing sixth (35.26) at Sandown in a Grade 5. Expecting significant improvement this line-up. 5. TO PERU won by a wide margin last start. Hard to beat again.

runners.name: SEGER
runners.comment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 4th over 660m at Bendigo beaten 2.25 lengths (38.41) behind Balding Sandy in a Restricted WIN H on June 5. Placed two back at Warrnambool. Capable of improvement on latest effort. Well placed and should feature.

runners.name: TO PERU
runners.comment: Good performance after tracking the speed to win by 1.75 lengths at Warragul over 460m (26.43) beating She's Salty in Rank Limit - Grade 5 on July 2. Ran one of the fastest times on the program in her latest win. Stay with her.

runners.name: SOCIALISM
runners.comment: Won over this track and trip. Last start finished 6th in a Restricted WIN on July 1 over 545m at Ballarat behind Starborn beaten 20 lengths (32.51). Capable of improvement on latest effort. Well placed and should feature.

runners.name: GREYSYND BONNIE
runners.comment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when second (30.53) over 525m at this track. Tough draw to overcome and will need the right run to feature.

runners.name: MISS JECKELL
runners.comment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (35.42) in a Grade 5, finishing a 3 length fifth. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and six places from 15 starts. Looking to others.

runners.name: GLOWING ETHICS
runners.comment: Missed the frame last time but finished in the minors at big odds two back when second (34.98) over 600m at this track. Tough draw to overcome but is among the better hopes.

G:CNP:2:2026-07-08.comment: 7. IMPRESS CARMEN looks close to another win after hitting the frame in a 6 length third (22.48) in a Novice race at this track. Racing well and deserves a win. 8. ORANA JET copped a check in the run and finished a well held 8 lengths fourth (22.66) last time in a Novice race at this track over 381m. Key player if finds best. 5. STUBBORN MOUSE has been in the money at her last two runs, most recently when second (22.21) in a Novice race over 381m at this track. Well placed here and can atone this time. 2. ELECTRIC KUNA is new to this distance but cannot be left out.

runners.name: ORANA JET
runners.comment: Was a winner three back at this track then finished in the minors before missing the frame last time when fourth (22.66) at this track. Well placed here and expected to bounce back.

runners.name: STUBBORN MOUSE
runners.comment: Working her way into winning form after claiming her maiden success on May 27 at this track over 381m. Last start was second over 381m in 22.21, behind Send It Alfie. Forward showing expected.

runners.name: ELECTRIC KUNA
runners.comment: Ended last campaign with a fifth (35.33) in a NOV at this track and returns after a ten weeks break. Capable of playing a big role.

runners.name: ATHENIAN BLADE
runners.comment: Last start finished sixth on June 30 over 400m at Mandurah behind Chi Chi Doll, beaten 6 lengths (23.11) in a Novice race. Shouldn't trouble the top few hopes.

runners.name: IMPRESS CARMEN
runners.comment: Well supported last time and gave a sight after a scorching early split but could only manage third, finishing 6 lengths back (22.48) over 381m at this track. Expected to go very well.

runners.name: MILWAUKEE MATES
runners.comment: Finished second last start (17.44) at big odds over 300m at Mandurah. Gets the rails draw this time. Cannot be ruled out.

runners.name: MATTE BLACK
runners.comment: Needs to do more than recent efforts, the latest a sixth over 488m at Mandurah. This looks too tough.

runners.name: BAND FOR BAND
runners.comment: Has finished last in her last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 381m. Capable of much better. Worth keeping safe.

H:RED:8:2026-07-08.comment: 5. FAN THE FLAME finished seventh last start over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 21 metres, after a good second there the run prior. Beautifully placed and is sure to play a major role. 1. ZOOMER BOOMER is a two-year-old filly from the Graham Dwyer yard on debut. A nice draw on the front line should ensure a cosy run. Showed some ability when a minor placegetter in a recent trial so anticipating a bright start to her career. 4. LIGHTYEAR is ready to improve this prep after debuting with a fourth four months ago over 1660m at Albion Park. 2. WANNABE ME is worth some thought after her last-start fourth over 1780m at this course on July 1. Include from the low draw.

runners.name: SOCIAL OUTING
runners.comment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 6th (Fr6) over 1780m at this track beaten 14 m by Red And Rich (2:13.20) on July 1 at $5. At his previous start solid effort when 2nd (Sr4) over 1850m after racing wide at Marburg, beaten a head by Vera Aguilera (2:17.80) on June 21 at $1.70. Sure to improve on the latest effort.

runners.name: FAN THE FLAME
runners.comment: Last start was seventh after being driven well back, behind Crunchy Tuna at Albion Park over 1660m in a 2yo on June 16 at $7.50. Raced better the start before that with a good run when 2nd (Fr3) over 1660m at Albion Park beaten 2.25 m by Genuine Star (1:59.70) in 2yo on June 9 at $12. Rates highly and from a much better draw can bounce back.

runners.name: ZOOMER BOOMER
runners.comment: Two-year-old filly (Bling It On - Rocky Bay Lass) making her debut. Finished third at Albion Park in a trial on June 30 over 1660m. Placed in a recent trial and expected to run well.

runners.name: WANNABE ME
runners.comment: Last start was well back in the run when 4th (Fr4) over 1780m at this track beaten 10 m by Red And Rich (2:13.20) on July 1 at $10. Before that, 6th (Fr4) over 1660m at Albion Park beaten 10 m by Crunchy Tuna (2:01.30) in 2yo on June 16 at $21. Capable of a better showing.

runners.name: LIGHTYEAR
runners.comment: Two-year-old colt facing the starter for the second time. At debut 4th (Fr5) over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 30 m by San Luca (1:59.50) in 2yo on March 10 at $13. Can play a role in the finish.

runners.name: KISSED
runners.comment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 6th (Fr4) over 1780m at this track beaten 12 m by Awholelottahappy (2:12.50) on June 17 at $41. Two runs back 4th (Fr3) over 1850m at Marburg, beaten 30 m by Pretty Wicked (2:17.40) on June 7 at $31. Has the task ahead.

G:MNM:4:2026-07-08.comment: 4. NODUFF TROPICANA has been on speed at the last couple here and fought on to hit the frame, last outing finishing third beaten 0.7 lengths (29.13). Key chance in this line up. 6. WINTERFIELD BIRD has shown good improvement at her last two starts, most recently finishing 2nd at this track over 480m. Ran one of the fastest times on the program last start despite finishing in the minors. Expected to feature again. 3. SUGAR ROSE broke a string of placings finishing in the money three on end before a last start sixth (39.17) at this track. Solid record here winning four races. Should play a prominent role. 5. LONGACRES FEE must be respected despite an unplaced effort here most recently.

runners.name: LONGACRES FEE
runners.comment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when third (29.84) over 480m at this track. Tricky draw to overcome and looks a each way chance only this field.

runners.name: NODUFF TROPICANA
runners.comment: Last start finished 3rd over 480m at this track beaten 0.7 lengths (29.13) behind Daves Blitz in an A7 on July 2. Has been racing well. Well placed here and looks a leading contender.

runners.name: STARMOUNT HERBIE
runners.comment: Turned in a fair debut over 480m at this track where he settled on speed and faded late to finish fifth (29.40). Further improved and drops down to the inside box this time. Failed to threaten last start and looks tested again.

runners.name: MYSTICAL CASH
runners.comment: Turned in a fair debut over 480m at this track where he settled on speed and faded late to finish fourth (29.29). Likely to be much improved. Prepared to just watch this time.

runners.name: SUGAR ROSE
runners.comment: Was out of the placings last time at this track but prior to that had been racing consistently, notching three minors in a row. Tends to go fairly well off the draw but looks a each way chance only this field.

runners.name: WINTERFIELD BIRD
runners.comment: Latest effort finished 2nd in an A7 on July 1 over 480m at this track behind Transfer Aaliyah beaten a neck (29.31). Has an excellent 28.69 best time at this course and distance. Big chance.

R:MBS:11:2026-07-08.comment: 3. TAISEI SURGE is a talented entire who has been in the money at all four starts. Last appeared when he was successful over 1200m at this track on November 12. Has a very good record here with three wins from four starts. Right in this. 5. CHAMPION HORSE landed his maiden success over this course and distance last time, scoring by 1.5 lengths. Shaping up nicely and he is one of the main chances. 9. JASON BAROWS was comfortably accounted for when fourth last time out over 1200m here after a win at this track at the previous outing. Likely improver with strong prospects. 2. KOTCHAN went around over this course and distance last time and led from the outset to score by 1.5 lengths. Sure to be thereabouts.

runners.name: TAISEI SURGE
runners.comment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last campaign winning by 0.5 len this track November 12 over 1200m defeating Kanetoshi Eterno with 57kg at $3.90. At his first start won by nose this track October 1 over 1200m defeating Dread Knight carrying 57kg at $1.90. Should be right in the finish.

runners.name: TEN X
runners.comment: At the latest run 8th of 12 at this track on June 18 over 1000m, 4.5 len behind Steel Fine carrying 56kg at $10.20. The race before that 4th of 12 at this track on June 4 over 1000m, 4 len behind Green Elixir carrying 56kg at $39.40. Fully tested on his recent run.

runners.name: JASON BAROWS
runners.comment: Racing well recently. Last start tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 8 at this track on June 24 over 1200m, 5 len behind Star Of Moulin with 57kg at $5. The run before that ran on from midfield and won by 3 len at this track June 11 over 1200m defeating Kaseno Force carrying 57kg at $2.20. Capable of more ? worth another chance.

runners.name: KOTCHAN
runners.comment: Most recently won by 1.5 len at this track June 23 over 1200m defeating Emma Diamond with 55kg at $15.40. Before that struggled in the run home; ran last of 8 at this track on June 9 over 1200m, 6 len behind Kitasan Mondo carrying 57kg at $6. Definite winning chance. Keep safe.

runners.name: CHAMPION HORSE
runners.comment: Third-up today. Resuming 5th of 9 at this track on June 11 over 1200m, 6 len behind Jason Barows carrying 57kg at $35.70. Second run from a spell favourite; won by 1.5 len at this track June 23 over 1200m defeating Glorious Aspen carrying 57kg at $2.90. Found his best form now. Will take beating.

runners.name: MERESANKH
runners.comment: Last start ran second last of 8 at this track on June 24 over 1200m, 8 len behind Star Of Moulin with 55kg at $38.40. The race before that 10th of 12 at this track on June 4 over 1800m, 14 len behind Meisho Hari Son with 55kg at $8.50. Fully tested on her recent run.

runners.name: BIG BAND BEAT
runners.comment: Returns from a 39-day let-up. Most recently 6th of 8 at Kochi on May 30 over 1300m, 14 len behind Meisho Fujitaka carrying 57kg at $30.50. The start before that 4th of 10 at Kochi on May 16 over 1400m, 4 len behind Meisho Hosen with 55kg at $15.20. Be tough to make an impression in this line-up.

runners.name: FRONTIER BRIGHT
runners.comment: At the latest run won by a nose at this track June 25 over 1200m defeating Sarasa Go Sign with 57kg at $13. The race before that couldn't go on with it; 6th of 9 at this track on June 11 over 1200m, 6 len behind Jason Barows carrying 57kg at $6.50. Last-start winner who can measure up again.

runners.name: MISSION EYES
runners.comment: At the latest run eased back early on 4th of 7 at this track on June 25 over 1000m, 7 len behind Cilantro carrying 57kg at $52.50. Before that 6th of 11 at Nagoya on May 22 over 1500m, 6 len behind T O Lippmann with 57kg at $43.20. Not going well enough. Needs to lift.

G:BAL:6:2026-07-08.comment: 1. ASTON LACE stalked the lead then burst clear to score (26.06) at Geelong in a Grade 5 over 460m. The one to beat again. 7. PAW ZENITH had been in super honest form hitting the frame three times on end before finishing sixth (24.98) at Sale last time. Form at the trip sound including five wins. Has ability and can atone. 8. ELECTRIC MAYHEM was safely held in tougher company last start after settling off pace at Sandown, but prior to that won by 3 lengths at Bendigo (28.35) beating Aussie Raven in a Grade 5 on June 10. Goes well out of this box with a win and four minor placings. A forward showing wouldn’t surprise. 2. ALACRITY DAVE cannot be ruled out.

runners.name: ASTON LACE
runners.comment: Good effort to score just five days ago over 460m at Geelong by 1.75 lengths in a Grade 5. Looks well placed and can measure up again.

runners.name: HONEY STIRRER
runners.comment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when third (28.97) over 510m at Sale. Tricky draw to overcome. Solid top-three prospects.

runners.name: ZIPPING TYRA
runners.comment: Strong performance to win by 2 lengths at Bendigo over 500m (28.64) beating Ollie Reiko in Bottom Up - Grade 5 on July 1. Prepared to risk on this occasion.

runners.name: PAW ZENITH
runners.comment: Last start finished 6th on July 5 over 435m at Sale behind Paw Estrella beaten 8 lengths (24.98) in a Grade 4/5. Had been in strong form, hitting the frame three times on end, before the latest effort. Can atone.

runners.name: ELECTRIC MAYHEM
runners.comment: Didn't make the placings last time at Sandown (30.85) in a Grade 5 NP, finishing a 13 length eighth. Has never missed the frame from five starts from the draw, including a win. Expected to go close.

runners.name: ALACRITY DAVE
runners.comment: Was out of the placings last time but the start prior finished in the minors when third (28.88) over 500m at Bendigo. Has a low draw and is in the mix.

runners.name: DAZZLING DYNAMO
runners.comment: Good effort last time when second (24.37) over 425m at Bendigo. Drawn close to the inside. Has to do a bit more.

runners.name: PETE'S ENTITY
runners.comment: Has finished seventh at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 9 lengths behind Paw Elodee over 450m. Capable of taking this out.

G:NAM:2:2026-07-08.comment: 3. RYDER RIPPLE turned in a fair 4th placed finish last time at this track over 305m (18.90). Goes well out of this box with a win and five minor placings. Better than the latest effort and deserves another chance. 5. MARCO MCROW found the frame for the second consecutive time when narrowly beaten into third last time out (18.77) over 305m at this track. Expected to do much better this time. 2. INVINCIA JEWEL ran good time (18.42) when third last start over 305m at this track, the second placing in a row. Well placed here and can atone this time. 4. HOLLYS GOLD returns from a 11 weeks layoff and deserves plenty of thought.

runners.name: INVINCIA JEWEL
runners.comment: Has been in the minor money the last two runs, the latest finishing third (18.42) at this track. Worth including.

runners.name: MARCO MCROW
runners.comment: Latest effort finished 3rd on July 1 over 305m at this track behind Flame Wood beaten 5 lengths (18.77) in a D4. Rates highly on best form. Expected to feature.

runners.name: SUDOKY ZOOM
runners.comment: Last start finished fifth over 305m at this track, beaten 7 lengths (19.10) behind Sonic Pixie in a D4 on July 1. Not keen, needs to lift.

runners.name: HOLLYS GOLD
runners.comment: Returns from a 11 weeks spell after being tipped out on the back of a sixth (31.43) over 500m at this track. Capable of playing a big role.

runners.name: RYDER RIPPLE
runners.comment: Latest effort finished 4th in a D4 on July 1 over 305m at this track behind Sonic Pixie beaten 4.5 lengths (18.90). Forward showing expected.

H:BAT:9:2026-07-08.comment: 1. TIGER JEWEL got it wrong when resuming but was very good last week when she raced three wide at this circuit and distance before boxing on for a 4.6m third. Good effort for second three back at Penrith. Can measure up off that effort. 7. FOGWATCH draws wider but is worth including following a respectable third at his most recent appearance. 9. BOOMER SHANNON is a long-time maiden but was only beaten 3.3m last start and draws for a trail so include.

runners.name: TIGER JEWEL
runners.comment: Two back was well beaten into tenth behind Maybe Janis at Parkes over 1660m in a 3yo F on June 21 at $1.40. Then a handy effort when beaten by 4.5 m finishing third behind Cheval Tiger at this track over 1730m in a M on July 1 at $3. Fitter again and should get every chance from the ace draw.

runners.name: SMALL INCOME
runners.comment: Last start 6th (Sr1) over 1730m at this track was 7th-12.74 at the bell, beaten 4 m by Onedarknight (2:10.40) on July 1 at $18. Before that, was driven from back in the field when 10th (Fr6) over 1730m at this track, at the bell was 7th-15.66 beaten 17 m by Mondo Glitz (2:05.90) on June 17 at $51. This looks a suitable assignment.

runners.name: FOGWATCH

runners.name: BOOMER SHANNON

runners.name: LITTLE ADELAIDE
runners.comment: Last start 9th (Fr4) over 1730m at this track was 3rd-4.51 at the bell, beaten 10 m by Onedarknight (2:10.40) on July 1 at $17. Two runs back 6th (Fr5) over 2260m at this track, beaten 19 m by Stuckinafence (2:52.80) on May 29 at $17. Cannot enthuse.

runners.name: BABY EL AY
runners.comment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 8th (Fr6) over 1730m at this track was 6th-10.22 at the bell, beaten 8 m by Onedarknight (2:10.40) on July 1 at $51. runners.name: EMILYS PRINCE
runners.comment: Last start was well back in the run when 10th (Fr8) over 1730m at this track, at the bell was 10th-20.2 beaten 16 m by Tennessee Kid (2:06.80) on June 24 at $126. runners.name: DREAM TO CURE
runners.comment: Last start 4th (Fr1) over 1730m at this track was 5th-8.76 at the bell, beaten 3 m by Onedarknight (2:10.40) on July 1 at $12. runners.comment: Solid run when beaten by 2.25 m finishing second behind Glinda Shannon at this track over 1730m on June 24 at $17. runners.name: KITS FLICK
runners.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage sixth last time out over 480m at this track. Tempted to look elsewhere.

runners.comment: Placed last time (18.08) at this track in a Free For All, finishing third and beaten 1.75 lengths. Has a win and three places from four starts from this draw. Makes strong appeal.

runners.comment: Good effort to win last start by one length over 320m at this track in a handy (17.96), beating Stephen Witherap. Can bring up a hat-trick.

runners.comment: Was out of placings last time (22.95) at Gosford in a Grade 5, finishing seventh and beaten 9 lengths. Goes very well off the draw boasting three wins and two places from seven starts. Others appear better placed.

runners.comment: Has hit the frame the last couple. Finished third at this track latest but prior to that clocked a solid 18.24 over 320m finishing second at this track. Place prospects appear best again.

runners.name: ELECTRIC KUNA
runners.comment: Ended last campaign with a fifth (35.33) in a NOV at this track and returns after a ten weeks break. Capable of playing a big role.

runners.name: ATHENIAN BLADE
runners.comment: Last start finished sixth on June 30 over 400m at Mandurah behind Chi Chi Doll, beaten 6 lengths (23.11) in a Novice race. Shouldn't trouble the top few hopes.

runners.name: BAND FOR BAND

H:RED:8:2026-07-08.comment: 5. FAN THE FLAME finished seventh last start over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 21 metres, after a good second there the run prior. Beautifully placed and is sure to play a major role. 1. ZOOMER BOOMER is a two-year-old filly from the Graham Dwyer yard on debut. A nice draw on the front line should ensure a cosy run. Showed some ability when a minor placegetter in a recent trial so anticipating a bright start to her career. 4. LIGHTYEAR is ready to improve this prep after debuting with a fourth four months ago over 1660m at Albion Park. 2. WANNABE ME is worth some thought after her last-start fourth over 1780m at this course on July 1. Include from the low draw.

runners.name: SOCIAL OUTING

At his previous start solid effort when 2nd (Sr4) over 1850m after racing wide at Marburg, beaten a head by Vera Aguilera (2:17.80) on June 21 at $1.70. Sure to improve on the latest effort.

runners.name: JASON BAROWS

The run before that ran on from midfield and won by 3 len at this track June 11 over 1200m defeating Kaseno Force carrying 57kg at $2.20. Capable of more ? worth another chance.

runners.name: KOTCHAN
runners.comment: Most recently won by 1.5 len at this track June 23 over 1200m defeating Emma Diamond with 55kg at $15.40. Before that struggled in the run home; ran last of 8 at this track on June 9 over 1200m, 6 len behind Kitasan Mondo carrying 57kg at $6. Definite winning chance. Keep safe.

runners.name: CHAMPION HORSE
runners.comment: Third-up today. Resuming 5th of 9 at this track on June 11 over 1200m, 6 len behind Jason Barows carrying 57kg at $35.70. Second run from a spell favourite; won by 1.5 len at this track June 23 over 1200m defeating Glorious Aspen carrying 57kg at $2.90. Found his best form now. Will take beating.

runners.name: MERESANKH
runners.comment: Last start ran second last of 8 at this track on June 24 over 1200m, 8 len behind Star Of Moulin with 55kg at $38.40. The race before that 10th of 12 at this track on June 4 over 1800m, 14 len behind Meisho Hari Son with 55kg at $8.50. Fully tested on her recent run.

runners.name: BIG BAND BEAT
runners.comment: Returns from a 39-day let-up. Most recently 6th of 8 at Kochi on May 30 over 1300m, 14 len behind Meisho Fujitaka carrying 57kg at $30.50. The start before that 4th of 10 at Kochi on May 16 over 1400m, 4 len behind Meisho Hosen with 55kg at $15.20. Be tough to make an impression in this line-up.

runners.name: FRONTIER BRIGHT
runners.comment: At the latest run won by a nose at this track June 25 over 1200m defeating Sarasa Go Sign with 57kg at $13. The race before that couldn't go on with it; 6th of 9 at this track on June 11 over 1200m, 6 len behind Jason Barows carrying 57kg at $6.50. Last-start winner who can measure up again.

runners.name: MISSION EYES
runners.comment: At the latest run eased back early on 4th of 7 at this track on June 25 over 1000m, 7 len behind Cilantro carrying 57kg at $52.50. Before that 6th of 11 at Nagoya on May 22 over 1500m, 6 len behind T O Lippmann with 57kg at $43.20. Not going well enough. Needs to lift.

G:BAL:6:2026-07-08.comment: 1. ASTON LACE stalked the lead then burst clear to score (26.06) at Geelong in a Grade 5 over 460m. The one to beat again. 7. PAW ZENITH had been in super honest form hitting the frame three times on end before finishing sixth (24.98) at Sale last time. Form at the trip sound including five wins. Has ability and can atone. 8. ELECTRIC MAYHEM was safely held in tougher company last start after settling off pace at Sandown, but prior to that won by 3 lengths at Bendigo (28.35) beating Aussie Raven in a Grade 5 on June 10. Goes well out of this box with a win and four minor placings. A forward showing wouldn’t surprise. 2. ALACRITY DAVE cannot be ruled out.

runners.name: ASTON LACE
runners.comment: Good effort to score just five days ago over 460m at Geelong by 1.75 lengths in a Grade 5. Looks well placed and can measure up again.

runners.comment: Has finished seventh at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 9 lengths behind Paw Elodee over 450m. Capable of taking this out.

runners.comment: Latest effort finished 3rd on July 1 over 305m at this track behind Flame Wood beaten 5 lengths (18.77) in a D4. Rates highly on best form. Expected to feature.

runners.name: INVINCIA JEWEL

runners.name: SUDOKY ZOOM
runners.comment: Last start finished fifth over 305m at this track, beaten 7 lengths (19.10) behind Sonic Pixie in a D4 on July 1. Not keen, needs to lift.

Good effort for second three back at Penrith. Can measure up off that effort. 7. FOGWATCH draws wider but is worth including following a respectable third at his most recent appearance. 9. BOOMER SHANNON is a long-time maiden but was only beaten 3.3m last start and draws for a trail so include.

This looks a suitable assignment.

runners.name: BABY EL AY
runners.comment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 8th (Fr6) over 1730m at this track was 6th-10.22 at the bell, beaten 8 m by Onedarknight (2:10.40) on July 1 at $51. runners.name: DREAM TO CURE
runners.comment: Last start 4th (Fr1) over 1730m at this track was 5th-8.76 at the bell, beaten 3 m by Onedarknight (2:10.40) on July 1 at $12. runners.comment: Most recent effort finished 5th in an A7 on July 1 over 480m at this track behind Home Cedrie beaten 5 lengths (30.53). Looks a solid contender.

runners.comment: Last start finished 3rd over 480m at this track beaten 5.5 lengths (30.82) behind Larkins Sophie in an A7 on July 1. Capable of improvement on latest effort. Well placed and should feature.

runners.comment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 4th over 660m at Bendigo beaten 2.25 lengths (38.41) behind Balding Sandy in a Restricted WIN H on June 5. Placed two back at Warrnambool. Capable of improvement on latest effort. Well placed and should feature.

runners.name: GLOWING ETHICS

G:BAL:6:2026-07-08.comment: 1. ASTON LACE stalked the lead then burst clear to score (26.06) at Geelong in a Grade 5 over 460m. The one to beat again. 7. Has ability and can atone. 8. ELECTRIC MAYHEM was safely held in tougher company last start after settling off pace at Sandown, but prior to that won by 3 lengths at Bendigo (28.35) beating Aussie Raven in a Grade 5 on June 10. Goes well out of this box with a win and four minor placings. A forward showing wouldn’t surprise. 2. ALACRITY DAVE cannot be ruled out.

runners.name: ASTON LACE
runners.comment: Good effort to score just five days ago over 460m at Geelong by 1.75 lengths in a Grade 5. Looks well placed and can measure up again.

runners.name: HONEY STIRRER
runners.comment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when third (28.97) over 510m at Sale. Tricky draw to overcome. Solid top-three prospects.

runners.name: PAW ZENITH
runners.comment: Last start finished 6th on July 5 over 435m at Sale behind Paw Estrella beaten 8 lengths (24.98) in a Grade 4/5. Had been in strong form, hitting the frame three times on end, before the latest effort. Can atone.

runners.name: ALACRITY DAVE
runners.comment: Was out of the placings last time but the start prior finished in the minors when third (28.88) over 500m at Bendigo. Has a low draw and is in the mix.

runners.name: DAZZLING DYNAMO
runners.comment: Good effort last time when second (24.37) over 425m at Bendigo. Drawn close to the inside. Has to do a bit more.

runners.name: ZIPPING TYRA
runners.comment: Strong performance to win by 2 lengths at Bendigo over 500m (28.64) beating Ollie Reiko in Bottom Up - Grade 5 on July 1. Prepared to risk on this occasion.

runners.name: ELECTRIC MAYHEM
runners.comment: Didn't make the placings last time at Sandown (30.85) in a Grade 5 NP, finishing a 13 length eighth. Has never missed the frame from five starts from the draw, including a win. Expected to go close.

runners.name: PETE'S ENTITY
runners.comment: Has finished seventh at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 9 lengths behind Paw Elodee over 450m. Capable of taking this out.

G:NAM:2:2026-07-08.comment: 3. RYDER RIPPLE turned in a fair 4th placed finish last time at this track over 305m (18.90). Goes well out of this box with a win and five minor placings. Better than the latest effort and deserves another chance. 5. MARCO MCROW found the frame for the second consecutive time when narrowly beaten into third last time out (18.77) over 305m at this track. Expected to do much better this time. 2. INVINCIA JEWEL ran good time (18.42) when third last start over 305m at this track, the second placing in a row. Well placed here and can atone this time. 4. HOLLYS GOLD returns from a 11 weeks layoff and deserves plenty of thought.

runners.name: HOLLYS GOLD
runners.comment: Returns from a 11 weeks spell after being tipped out on the back of a sixth (31.43) over 500m at this track. Capable of playing a big role.

runners.name: MARCO MCROW
runners.comment: Latest effort finished 3rd on July 1 over 305m at this track behind Flame Wood beaten 5 lengths (18.77) in a D4. Rates highly on best form. Expected to feature.

runners.name: RYDER RIPPLE
runners.comment: Latest effort finished 4th in a D4 on July 1 over 305m at this track behind Sonic Pixie beaten 4.5 lengths (18.90). Forward showing expected.

runners.name: INVINCIA JEWEL
runners.comment: Has been in the minor money the last two runs, the latest finishing third (18.42) at this track. Worth including.

runners.name: SUDOKY ZOOM
runners.comment: Last start finished fifth over 305m at this track, beaten 7 lengths (19.10) behind Sonic Pixie in a D4 on July 1. Not keen, needs to lift.

H:BAT:9:2026-07-08.comment: 1. TIGER JEWEL got it wrong when resuming but was very good last week when she raced three wide at this circuit and distance before boxing on for a 4.6m third. Fitter again and should get every chance from the ace draw in a race weakened by scratchings. 4. SMALL INCOME came from the back row when beaten less than 4m here last start. Good effort for second three back at Penrith. Can measure up off that effort. 7. FOGWATCH draws wider but is worth including following a respectable third at his most recent appearance. 9. BOOMER SHANNON is a long-time maiden but was only beaten 3.3m last start and draws for a trail so include.

runners.name: TIGER JEWEL
runners.comment: Two back was well beaten into tenth behind Maybe Janis at Parkes over 1660m in a 3yo F on June 21 at $1.40. Then a handy effort when beaten by 4.5 m finishing third behind Cheval Tiger at this track over 1730m in a M on July 1 at $3. Fitter again and should get every chance from the ace draw.

runners.name: SMALL INCOME
runners.comment: Last start 6th (Sr1) over 1730m at this track was 7th-12.74 at the bell, beaten 4 m by Onedarknight (2:10.40) on July 1 at $18. Before that, was driven from back in the field when 10th (Fr6) over 1730m at this track, at the bell was 7th-15.66 beaten 17 m by Mondo Glitz (2:05.90) on June 17 at $51. This looks a suitable assignment.

runners.name: WINDFIELD BLUE
runners.comment: Second up after running was driven from back in the field when 9th (Fr6) over 1720m at Dubbo, at the bell was 9th-19.2 beaten 19 m by Stay Lucky (2:08.30) in 3yo on June 12 at $41. Possible improver.

runners.name: FOGWATCH
runners.comment: Improved last start with a solid effort despite getting well back, when 3rd (Fr5) over 1730m at this track was 9th-17.78 at the bell, beaten 2.5 m by Onedarknight (2:10.40) on July 1 at $51. Good showing expected.

runners.name: BOOMER SHANNON
runners.comment: Last start 5th (Sr2) over 1730m at this track, at the bell was 2nd-2.26 beaten 3.5 m by Onedarknight (2:10.40) on July 1 at $26. Before that, 9th (Fr4) over 1730m after showing early speed and racing wide at this track, at the bell was 3rd-3.42 beaten 10 m by Sing With One Voice (2:06.30) on June 10 at $41. First four hope.

runners.name: LITTLE ADELAIDE
runners.comment: Last start 9th (Fr4) over 1730m at this track was 3rd-4.51 at the bell, beaten 10 m by Onedarknight (2:10.40) on July 1 at $17. Two runs back 6th (Fr5) over 2260m at this track, beaten 19 m by Stuckinafence (2:52.80) on May 29 at $17. Cannot enthuse.

runners.name: BABY EL AY
runners.comment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 8th (Fr6) over 1730m at this track was 6th-10.22 at the bell, beaten 8 m by Onedarknight (2:10.40) on July 1 at $51. Two runs back 4th (Sr1) over 1730m at this track, at the bell was 3rd-5.05 beaten 12 m by Glinda Shannon (2:10.10) on June 24 at $12. Improvement needed.

runners.name: EMILYS PRINCE
runners.comment: Last start was well back in the run when 10th (Fr8) over 1730m at this track, at the bell was 10th-20.2 beaten 16 m by Tennessee Kid (2:06.80) on June 24 at $126. Two runs back 9th (Fr8) over 1730m at this track, at the bell was 9th-19.92 beaten 17 m by Mondo Glitz (2:05.90) on June 17 at $31. Must do a more.

runners.name: DREAM TO CURE
runners.comment: Last start 4th (Fr1) over 1730m at this track was 5th-8.76 at the bell, beaten 3 m by Onedarknight (2:10.40) on July 1 at $12. Strips fitter and from an inside draw can make an impact.

runners.comment: Solid run when beaten by 2.25 m finishing second behind Glinda Shannon at this track over 1730m on June 24 at $17. Then a handy effort when beaten by 2.25 m finishing second after a quick start, behind Onedarknight at this track over 1730m on July 1 at $9.50. In fine form. Looks close to a win and draws well.

G:KIK:7:2026-07-08.comment: 4. KILTEGAN SHIV jumped from this trap last time and also the same course and distance when a one length third (30.30) in an A7. Has the ability and looks a key chance. 5. HILLROAD BELLE shows ability but remains a maiden after 15 starts. Is performing well without winning placing at her last three starts. Winning chance. 1. DIDDLEY DODA was midfield throughout and finished there last time when 5th (30.34) at this track. Key player if finds best. 6. LARKINS SPICE was unplaced here last start but gets her chance to atone.

runners.name: DIDDLEY DODA
runners.comment: Drawn the inside alley. At the last outing finished 5th over 480m at this track beaten 1.75 lengths (30.34) behind Chiltern Emmie in an A7 on July 1. Major threat on best form.

runners.name: LARKINS SPICE
runners.comment: Most recent effort finished 5th in an A7 on July 1 over 480m at this track behind Home Cedrie beaten 5 lengths (30.53). Looks a solid contender.

runners.name: KILTEGAN SHIV
runners.comment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 480m. Last start finished 3rd on July 1 over 480m at this track behind Chiltern Emmie beaten one length (30.30) in an A7. Rates highly and looks tough to beat.

runners.name: HILLROAD BELLE
runners.comment: Last start finished 3rd over 480m at this track beaten 5.5 lengths (30.82) behind Larkins Sophie in an A7 on July 1. Capable of improvement on latest effort. Well placed and should feature.

runners.name: YACHT MARSHAL
runners.comment: Has finished fourth at his last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 480m. Not up to this.

runners.name: KITS FLICK
runners.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage sixth last time out over 480m at this track. Tempted to look elsewhere.

G:RIC:6:2026-07-08.comment: 1. STEPHEN WITHERAP has a strong record this trip with 19 wins and 13 placings from 43 starts. Placed last time (18.04) at this track in a Free For All, finishing second and beaten one length. Looks a leading chance on best. 8. ZIPPING ZEPPELIN was game in defeat when finished in the minors last start over the 320m at this track, running a good 18.08 in a Free For All. Has the ability and looks a key chance. 2. MAYBE NEXT WEEK was out of placings last time (18.18) at this track in a Free For All, finishing fourth and beaten 3 lengths. With even luck and a clean start should be around the money. 4. SUMMER DREAM must be respected as a past winner at this course and distance.

runners.name: STEPHEN WITHERAP
runners.comment: Won two starts back over 320m at this track. Last start he finished 2nd on July 3 over 320m at this track behind Summer Dream beaten one length (18.04) in a Free For All. Draw likely to suit. Has run very fast time at this course and distance. Go close on his best form.

runners.name: SUMMER DREAM
runners.comment: Good effort to win last start by one length over 320m at this track in a handy (17.96), beating Stephen Witherap. Can bring up a hat-trick.

runners.name: MAYBE NEXT WEEK
runners.comment: Was a winner three back at this track then finished in the minors before missing the frame last time when fourth (18.18) at this track. Has ability and looks one of the hopes in this.

runners.name: ZIPPING ZEPPELIN
runners.comment: Placed last time (18.08) at this track in a Free For All, finishing third and beaten 1.75 lengths. Has a win and three places from four starts from this draw. Makes strong appeal.

runners.name: RAINY DREAM
runners.comment: Has hit the frame the last couple. Finished third at this track latest but prior to that clocked a solid 18.24 over 320m finishing second at this track. Place prospects appear best again.

runners.name: ISABELLA KADE
runners.comment: Was out of placings last time (22.95) at Gosford in a Grade 5, finishing seventh and beaten 9 lengths. Goes very well off the draw boasting three wins and two places from seven starts. Others appear better placed.

runners.name: SHANTI BAY
runners.comment: Good effort to win last start by 0.8 lengths over 365m at Nowra in a handy (20.71), beating Firefly Gal. Will find this a bit tougher, tempted to look elsewhere.

Has claims if he runs up to expectations. 2. SOCIALISM missed the frame and was safely held latest finishing 6th at Ballarat following on from a third place finish (30.75) at this track the start prior. Should be about the money. 4. GLOWING ETHICS has been mixing form lately, hitting the frame two back before finishing sixth (35.26) at Sandown in a Grade 5. Expecting significant improvement this line-up. 5. TO PERU won by a wide margin last start. Hard to beat again.

runners.name: SEGER
runners.comment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 4th over 660m at Bendigo beaten 2.25 lengths (38.41) behind Balding Sandy in a Restricted WIN H on June 5. Placed two back at Warrnambool. Capable of improvement on latest effort. Well placed and should feature.

runners.name: TO PERU
runners.comment: Good performance after tracking the speed to win by 1.75 lengths at Warragul over 460m (26.43) beating She's Salty in Rank Limit - Grade 5 on July 2. Ran one of the fastest times on the program in her latest win. Stay with her.

runners.name: SOCIALISM
runners.comment: Won over this track and trip. Last start finished 6th in a Restricted WIN on July 1 over 545m at Ballarat behind Starborn beaten 20 lengths (32.51). Capable of improvement on latest effort. Well placed and should feature.

runners.name: GREYSYND BONNIE
runners.comment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when second (30.53) over 525m at this track. Tough draw to overcome and will need the right run to feature.

runners.name: MISS JECKELL
runners.comment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (35.42) in a Grade 5, finishing a 3 length fifth. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and six places from 15 starts. Looking to others.

runners.name: GLOWING ETHICS
runners.comment: Missed the frame last time but finished in the minors at big odds two back when second (34.98) over 600m at this track. Tough draw to overcome but is among the better hopes.

G:CNP:2:2026-07-08.comment: 7. IMPRESS CARMEN looks close to another win after hitting the frame in a 6 length third (22.48) in a Novice race at this track. Racing well and deserves a win. 8. ORANA JET copped a check in the run and finished a well held 8 lengths fourth (22.66) last time in a Novice race at this track over 381m. Key player if finds best. 5. STUBBORN MOUSE has been in the money at her last two runs, most recently when second (22.21) in a Novice race over 381m at this track. Well placed here and can atone this time. 2. ELECTRIC KUNA is new to this distance but cannot be left out.

runners.name: IMPRESS CARMEN
runners.comment: Well supported last time and gave a sight after a scorching early split but could only manage third, finishing 6 lengths back (22.48) over 381m at this track. Expected to go very well.

runners.name: ORANA JET
runners.comment: Was a winner three back at this track then finished in the minors before missing the frame last time when fourth (22.66) at this track. Well placed here and expected to bounce back.

runners.name: STUBBORN MOUSE
runners.comment: Working her way into winning form after claiming her maiden success on May 27 at this track over 381m. Last start was second over 381m in 22.21, behind Send It Alfie. Forward showing expected.

runners.name: ELECTRIC KUNA
runners.comment: Ended last campaign with a fifth (35.33) in a NOV at this track and returns after a ten weeks break. Capable of playing a big role.

runners.name: ATHENIAN BLADE
runners.comment: Last start finished sixth on June 30 over 400m at Mandurah behind Chi Chi Doll, beaten 6 lengths (23.11) in a Novice race. Shouldn't trouble the top few hopes.

runners.name: MILWAUKEE MATES
runners.comment: Finished second last start (17.44) at big odds over 300m at Mandurah. Gets the rails draw this time. Cannot be ruled out.

runners.name: MATTE BLACK
runners.comment: Needs to do more than recent efforts, the latest a sixth over 488m at Mandurah. This looks too tough.

runners.name: BAND FOR BAND
runners.comment: Has finished last in her last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 381m. Capable of much better. Worth keeping safe.

H:RED:8:2026-07-08.comment: 5. FAN THE FLAME finished seventh last start over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 21 metres, after a good second there the run prior. Beautifully placed and is sure to play a major role. 1. ZOOMER BOOMER is a two-year-old filly from the Graham Dwyer yard on debut. A nice draw on the front line should ensure a cosy run. Showed some ability when a minor placegetter in a recent trial so anticipating a bright start to her career. 4. LIGHTYEAR is ready to improve this prep after debuting with a fourth four months ago over 1660m at Albion Park. 2. WANNABE ME is worth some thought after her last-start fourth over 1780m at this course on July 1. Include from the low draw.

runners.name: SOCIAL OUTING
runners.comment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 6th (Fr6) over 1780m at this track beaten 14 m by Red And Rich (2:13.20) on July 1 at $5. At his previous start solid effort when 2nd (Sr4) over 1850m after racing wide at Marburg, beaten a head by Vera Aguilera (2:17.80) on June 21 at $1.70. Sure to improve on the latest effort.

runners.name: FAN THE FLAME
runners.comment: Last start was seventh after being driven well back, behind Crunchy Tuna at Albion Park over 1660m in a 2yo on June 16 at $7.50. Raced better the start before that with a good run when 2nd (Fr3) over 1660m at Albion Park beaten 2.25 m by Genuine Star (1:59.70) in 2yo on June 9 at $12. Rates highly and from a much better draw can bounce back.

runners.name: ZOOMER BOOMER
runners.comment: Two-year-old filly (Bling It On - Rocky Bay Lass) making her debut. Finished third at Albion Park in a trial on June 30 over 1660m. Placed in a recent trial and expected to run well.

runners.name: WANNABE ME
runners.comment: Last start was well back in the run when 4th (Fr4) over 1780m at this track beaten 10 m by Red And Rich (2:13.20) on July 1 at $10. Before that, 6th (Fr4) over 1660m at Albion Park beaten 10 m by Crunchy Tuna (2:01.30) in 2yo on June 16 at $21. Capable of a better showing.

runners.name: LIGHTYEAR
runners.comment: Two-year-old colt facing the starter for the second time. At debut 4th (Fr5) over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 30 m by San Luca (1:59.50) in 2yo on March 10 at $13. Can play a role in the finish.

runners.name: KISSED
runners.comment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 6th (Fr4) over 1780m at this track beaten 12 m by Awholelottahappy (2:12.50) on June 17 at $41. Two runs back 4th (Fr3) over 1850m at Marburg, beaten 30 m by Pretty Wicked (2:17.40) on June 7 at $31. Has the task ahead.

SUGAR ROSE broke a string of placings finishing in the money three on end before a last start sixth (39.17) at this track. Solid record here winning four races. Should play a prominent role. 5. LONGACRES FEE must be respected despite an unplaced effort here most recently.

runners.name: LONGACRES FEE
runners.comment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when third (29.84) over 480m at this track. Tricky draw to overcome and looks a each way chance only this field.

runners.name: NODUFF TROPICANA
runners.comment: Last start finished 3rd over 480m at this track beaten 0.7 lengths (29.13) behind Daves Blitz in an A7 on July 2. Has been racing well. Well placed here and looks a leading contender.

runners.name: STARMOUNT HERBIE
runners.comment: Turned in a fair debut over 480m at this track where he settled on speed and faded late to finish fifth (29.40). Further improved and drops down to the inside box this time. Failed to threaten last start and looks tested again.

runners.name: MYSTICAL CASH
runners.comment: Turned in a fair debut over 480m at this track where he settled on speed and faded late to finish fourth (29.29). Likely to be much improved. Prepared to just watch this time.

runners.name: SUGAR ROSE
runners.comment: Was out of the placings last time at this track but prior to that had been racing consistently, notching three minors in a row. Tends to go fairly well off the draw but looks a each way chance only this field.

runners.name: WINTERFIELD BIRD
runners.comment: Latest effort finished 2nd in an A7 on July 1 over 480m at this track behind Transfer Aaliyah beaten a neck (29.31). Has an excellent 28.69 best time at this course and distance. Big chance.

R:MBS:11:2026-07-08.comment: 3. TAISEI SURGE is a talented entire who has been in the money at all four starts. Last appeared when he was successful over 1200m at this track on November 12. Has a very good record here with three wins from four starts. Right in this. 5. CHAMPION HORSE landed his maiden success over this course and distance last time, scoring by 1.5 lengths. Shaping up nicely and he is one of the main chances. 9. JASON BAROWS was comfortably accounted for when fourth last time out over 1200m here after a win at this track at the previous outing. Likely improver with strong prospects. 2. KOTCHAN went around over this course and distance last time and led from the outset to score by 1.5 lengths. Sure to be thereabouts.

runners.name: TEN X
runners.comment: At the latest run 8th of 12 at this track on June 18 over 1000m, 4.5 len behind Steel Fine carrying 56kg at $10.20. The race before that 4th of 12 at this track on June 4 over 1000m, 4 len behind Green Elixir carrying 56kg at $39.40. Fully tested on his recent run.

runners.name: TAISEI SURGE
runners.comment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last campaign winning by 0.5 len this track November 12 over 1200m defeating Kanetoshi Eterno with 57kg at $3.90. At his first start won by nose this track October 1 over 1200m defeating Dread Knight carrying 57kg at $1.90. Should be right in the finish.

runners.name: JASON BAROWS
runners.comment: Racing well recently. Last start tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 8 at this track on June 24 over 1200m, 5 len behind Star Of Moulin with 57kg at $5. The run before that ran on from midfield and won by 3 len at this track June 11 over 1200m defeating Kaseno Force carrying 57kg at $2.20. Capable of more ? worth another chance.

runners.name: KOTCHAN
runners.comment: Most recently won by 1.5 len at this track June 23 over 1200m defeating Emma Diamond with 55kg at $15.40. Before that struggled in the run home; ran last of 8 at this track on June 9 over 1200m, 6 len behind Kitasan Mondo carrying 57kg at $6. Definite winning chance. Keep safe.

runners.name: MERESANKH
runners.comment: Last start ran second last of 8 at this track on June 24 over 1200m, 8 len behind Star Of Moulin with 55kg at $38.40. The race before that 10th of 12 at this track on June 4 over 1800m, 14 len behind Meisho Hari Son with 55kg at $8.50. Fully tested on her recent run.

runners.name: CHAMPION HORSE
runners.comment: Third-up today. Resuming 5th of 9 at this track on June 11 over 1200m, 6 len behind Jason Barows carrying 57kg at $35.70. Second run from a spell favourite; won by 1.5 len at this track June 23 over 1200m defeating Glorious Aspen carrying 57kg at $2.90. Found his best form now. Will take beating.

runners.name: BIG BAND BEAT
runners.comment: Returns from a 39-day let-up. Most recently 6th of 8 at Kochi on May 30 over 1300m, 14 len behind Meisho Fujitaka carrying 57kg at $30.50. The start before that 4th of 10 at Kochi on May 16 over 1400m, 4 len behind Meisho Hosen with 55kg at $15.20. Be tough to make an impression in this line-up.

runners.name: FRONTIER BRIGHT
runners.comment: At the latest run won by a nose at this track June 25 over 1200m defeating Sarasa Go Sign with 57kg at $13. The race before that couldn't go on with it; 6th of 9 at this track on June 11 over 1200m, 6 len behind Jason Barows carrying 57kg at $6.50. Last-start winner who can measure up again.

runners.name: MISSION EYES
runners.comment: At the latest run eased back early on 4th of 7 at this track on June 25 over 1000m, 7 len behind Cilantro carrying 57kg at $52.50. Before that 6th of 11 at Nagoya on May 22 over 1500m, 6 len behind T O Lippmann with 57kg at $43.20. Not going well enough. Needs to lift.
